entity.summary: Solana automated-market-maker decentralized exchange and launchpad providing token trading, AMM liquidity, project creation, developer APIs, and protocol fee flows.
entity.notes: Current first-party Heaven website and documentation remain reachable. Official documentation identifies Heaven as a launchpad and AMM on Solana and publishes developer and API resources; DefiLlama independently reports current DEX-volume and fee surfaces.

evidence.title: Heaven official application
evidence.notes: Current first-party Heaven application remains reachable and exposes project discovery and creation entry points.

evidence.title: Heaven documentation introduction
evidence.notes: First-party documentation identifies Heaven as a launchpad and AMM on Solana and links developer quickstart and REST API resources.

evidence.title: Heaven DEX metrics and protocol information
evidence.notes: Protocol registry classifies Heaven as a Solana AMM DEX and reports current fee, revenue, holder-revenue, and DEX-volume surfaces.
